series_metadata.series_description: Record includes test tape results, rejection letters, and other documents related to magnetic tape transmitter.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 months after hardcopy is prepped, scanned (imaged), and quality control is complete then destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain on system until enterprise for which the account was established is no longer in operation and its account has not been chargeable for a period of 7 years and there are no outstanding debts, then destroy. Retain rejection letters until printed., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
